settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Personalise how Turboist looks and behaves.

theme.heading: Theme
theme.description: Choose between light, dark, or matching your system.

language.heading: Language
language.description: Pick the interface language. Your choice is saved on the server.

weekly.heading: Weekly unplanned exclusions
weekly.description: Tasks with these labels will not show the unplanned badge even if not scheduled for the week.

version.heading: App version
version.description: The currently running version of Turboist.

session.heading: Active sessions
session.description: Sign out from all devices and browsers, including this one.

auth.setupSubtitle: Turboist runs single-user. Pick a username and password.

troiki.rulesIntro: Three categories, max 3 projects each. Capacity in Medium and Rest is earned by completing tasks in the category above.

rules.mediumHint: +1 slot per completed task in Important.
rules.restHint: +1 slot per completed task in Medium.
rules.bullet1: Removing a project frees its slot but does not unlock the next category.
rules.bullet2: Earned capacity accumulates and never expires.
rules.bullet3: Re-completing a task does not yield extra capacity.
rules.bullet4: All tasks in an assigned project inherit the category priority.

section.importantDescription: Top three projects that demand focus.

troiki.cycleInProgress: Cycle in progress — Medium and Rest unlock as you complete the previous category.
troiki.initialFill: Initial fill — assign projects to Important, then optionally seed Medium and Rest. Press Start to lock in the cycle.
troiki.startDisabled: Assign at least one project to Important first
troiki.lockedTitle: Locked — earn capacity by completing the previous category
troiki.openInitialTitle: Open during initial fill — capacity is locked in when you press Start
troiki.unlockMedium: Complete an Important task to unlock a Medium slot.
troiki.unlockRest: Complete a Medium task to unlock a Rest slot.
troiki.assignHint: Use the project actions menu (⋯ → Assign to Troiki) to assign projects to this section before starting the cycle.
troiki.noTasks: No tasks yet — add one to get started.

toast.pickProject: Pick a project in this Troiki section

today.emptyDescription: No tasks are scheduled for today. Enjoy the calm.

tomorrow.emptyDescription: Schedule tasks ahead to see them here.

inbox.emptyDescription: Tasks captured without a project land here. Press Q to add one.

week.emptyDescription: Plan tasks for this week from Backlog or by setting a due date.

backlog.emptyDescription: Park tasks here when they're not actionable yet.

completed.emptyDescription: Tasks you complete will show up here, grouped by day.
